heading: (Preview) Using the Atlas Go SDK with Service Account Authentication
body:
Atlas SDK Go provides OAuth Authentication using Service Accounts. This
is currently available as a [Preview](https://www.mongodb.com/resources/beta-programs) feature. To learn
more, see [Preview Features](preview-features).

A Service Account implements an OAuth [client\_credentials](https://oauth.net/2/grant-types/client-credentials) grant.
For more information about the feature, please refer to [Service Account Public documentation.](atlas/api/api-authentication)
